mapper.sql: alevel_paper_id, paper_code, paper_name, exam_board, qualification, subject_code, subject_name, unit_code, unit_name, exam_session, source_name, duration_seconds, total_score, status, remark, create_time, update_time, delete_flag
mapper.select: SELECT FROM alevel_paper WHERE alevel_paper_id = #{paperId} AND status = 1 AND delete_flag = '1' LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM alevel_paper WHERE paper_code = #{paperCode} AND status = 1 AND delete_flag = '1' LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM alevel_paper WHERE subject_code = #{subjectCode} AND exam_session = #{examSession} AND status = 1 AND delete_flag = '1' ORDER BY alevel_paper_id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE alevel_paper SET paper_name = #{paperName}, exam_board = #{examBoard}, qualification = #{qualification}, subject_code = #{subjectCode}, subject_name = #{subjectName}, unit_code = #{unitCode}, unit_name = #{unitName}, exam_session = #{examSession}, source_name = #{sourceName}, duration_seconds = #{durationSeconds}, total_score = #{totalScore}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, update_time = #{updateTime}, delete_flag = #{deleteFlag} WHERE alevel_paper_id = #{alevelPaperId}
UPDATE alevel_paper SET status = #{status}, update_time = #{updateTime}, delete_flag = '1' WHERE alevel_paper_id = #{paperId}
